title: MereCraft
description: MereCraft aims to be as vanilla & lightweight as possible, with a focus on optimisation.
body:
Client & Server versions!

MereCraft was created with the intention to not alter the vanilla experience all too much.
The modpack contains mainly quality of life mods, as well as optimisation mods.

A full list of what is included in the latest version:

## Dependencies & Libraries
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)
- [JamLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/jamlib)
- [Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

## Exploration
- [Nature's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-compass)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)

## Gameplay
- [FallingTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree)
- [KleeSlabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/kleeslabs)
- [RightClickHarvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/rightclickharvest)
- [Trade Cycling](https://modrinth.com/mod/trade-cycling)

## Multiplayer
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)

## Performance
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)

## Quality of Life
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
- [Easy Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-shulker-boxes)
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)
- [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)

## Shaders
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)

## Utility
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
